name: Orange Beets with Spice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off beet tops and wash beets well.
2. Simmer beets, covered, in enough water to cover for 45-60 minutes or until tender.
3. Drain and cover with cold water; trim off tops and roots and remove skin.
4. Slice into 1/4 inch thick pieces and set aside.
5. In a medium saucepan, combine cornstarch, salt, allspice, pepper, orange rind, and brown sugar.
6. Gradually add orange juice, stirring until smooth.
7. Add butter. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture thickens.
8. Add beets and heat through.
9. Place in individual serving dishes and sprinkle with chives.
